title: Review idea
instruction: Read IDEA.md and confirm the irreducible concept is present and usable before moving on.

title: Bootstrap status
instruction: Make sure STATUS.json exists in workspace and becomes the active checklist for the rest of the workflow.

title: Write story
instruction: Create STORY.md so the film's narrative arc is clear enough to guide shot planning.

title: Write characters
instruction: Create CHARACTERS.md with stable visual and behavioral anchors for recurring subjects.

title: Create character sheets folder
instruction: Create CHARACTER-SHEETS/ so character reference images have a canonical home in the workflow.

title: Write storyboard
instruction: Create STORYBOARD.md with stable shot IDs such as SHOT-01 and a shot-by-shot plan.

title: Create storyboard shots folder
instruction: Create STORYBOARD-SHOTS/ so shot images can be stored using the same shot IDs used in STORYBOARD.md.

title: Create keyframes registry
instruction: Create KEYFRAMES.json as the flat list of keyframes planned or approved for each shot.

title: Create keyframe prompts
instruction: Create KEYFRAME-PROMPTS.json as the flat list of still-image prompts keyed by stable shot IDs.

title: Create video prompts
instruction: Create VIDEO-PROMPTS.json as the flat list of executable video prompts keyed by stable shot IDs.
